chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 443 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For Hg of Bail Application (Notice issued for 12.04.2023) 12.04.2023: M/s. Saathi M. Ishaque and S. K. Lodhi Advocates along with Applicant Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Addl. P.G..-.-.-.-.-. The Applicant Rokhan is nominated accused in FIR No. 607 of 2022 registered under Section 320/427 PPC at Police Station Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi. Sections 320/427 PPC are bailable where bail is to be given as a right and will have to be determined after evidence is led at trial. The complainant has been served, however, no one is present. Interim pre arrest bail earlier granted to the Applicant is confirmed on same terms and conditions. J U D G E Amjad PS
